attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-9d96fc58949718b1fb4c181a374b09f6-4da41562db09f8da-03'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.project_id = $1::UUID ORDER BY tasks.created_at ASC /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-9d96fc58949718b1fb4c181a374b09f6-1941617b9d0d36fe-03'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT comments.task_id AS comments_task_id, comments.id AS comments_id, comments.author_id AS comments_author_id, comments.content AS comments_content, comments.created_at AS comments_created_at 
FROM comments 
WHERE comments.task_id IN ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, $3::UUID, $4::UUID, $5::UUID) ORDER BY comments.created_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-9d96fc58949718b1fb4c181a374b09f6-83c921ec9f1e4c1b-03'*/
